name: Chicken Saltimbocca with Prosciutto & Sage
description: A classic Italian dish featuring pan-seared chicken cutlets topped with prosciutto and fresh sage, typically finished with a pan sauce.
preparationNotes: Pan-seared with prosciutto and fresh sage.
customerGuidance: A classic Italian dish that's perfect for protein-focused diners.

name: Chicken Florentine with Spinach & White Wine Cream Sauce
description: A classic Italian-American dish where chicken breasts are typically pan-seared and served with a rich, creamy sauce made with spinach, white wine, garlic, and Parmesan cheese.
preparationNotes: Pan-seared chicken breast served in a creamy spinach sauce, often enhanced with Parmesan cheese, garlic, and white wine. Chicken is typically dredged in flour.
customerGuidance: A rich and flavorful chicken dish with tender spinach in a creamy Parmesan and white wine sauce.

name: Chicken Piccata with Lemon, Capers & Parsley
description: A classic Italian dish where chicken cutlets are dredged in flour, pan-fried, and served with a tangy sauce made from lemon juice, butter, capers, and often white wine or chicken stock.
preparationNotes: Pan-fried chicken cutlets served with a bright lemon-butter and caper sauce.
customerGuidance: A zesty and savory chicken dish with a light lemon, butter, and caper sauce.

name: Chicken Cacciatore with Mushrooms, Peppers & Onions
description: A rustic Italian 'hunter-style' chicken stew, braised with onions, herbs, tomatoes, often bell peppers, and sometimes wine.
preparationNotes: Chicken braised in a hearty tomato-based sauce with vegetables like mushrooms, peppers, and onions.
customerGuidance: A flavorful and rustic 'hunter-style' chicken stew with simmered vegetables.

name: Chicken Parmesan White with Sun-dried Tomato & White Wine Cream Sauce
description: A variation of Chicken Parmesan featuring breaded chicken cutlets with a creamy white wine sauce, sun-dried tomatoes, and Parmesan cheese.
preparationNotes: Breaded chicken in a creamy white wine and sun-dried tomato sauce, topped with Parmesan.
customerGuidance: A rich take on Chicken Parmesan with a luscious white wine cream sauce and sun-dried tomatoes.

name: Chicken Parmesan Red with Mozzarella & Tomato Sauce
description: The classic Chicken Parmesan: breaded chicken cutlets topped with tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese, then baked until bubbly.
preparationNotes: Breaded chicken cutlet baked with tomato sauce and mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses.
customerGuidance: The beloved classic: crispy chicken, tangy tomato sauce, and melted mozzarella.

name: Chicken Marsala with Mushrooms & Creamy Marsala Wine Sauce
description: An Italian-American dish of chicken cutlets braised in a rich sauce made with Marsala wine and mushrooms. Can be creamy or not.
preparationNotes: Pan-fried chicken in a savory Marsala wine and mushroom sauce, often with cream.
customerGuidance: Tender chicken in a rich, earthy mushroom and Marsala wine sauce.

name: Chicken Puttanesca with Olives, Capers & Anchovies (Moderately Spicy)
description: Chicken cooked in a vibrant and piquant Puttanesca sauce, typically made with tomatoes, olives, capers, anchovies, garlic, and chili flakes.
preparationNotes: Chicken simmered in a zesty tomato sauce with olives, capers, anchovies, and a hint of spice.
customerGuidance: A boldly flavored chicken dish with a tangy, savory, and slightly spicy tomato sauce.

name: BBQ Guinness Chicken
description: Chicken pieces, typically thighs or breasts, marinated and glazed with a unique BBQ sauce infused with Guinness stout, offering rich, malty, and smoky flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in Worcestershire or BBQ sauce base)
preparationNotes: Chicken cooked with a BBQ sauce featuring Guinness stout, which contains gluten (barley). Worcestershire sauce often contains anchovies and soy.
customerGuidance: Flavorful chicken with a rich, malty Guinness-infused BBQ sauce.

name: Carolina BBQ Chicken
description: Chicken, often smoked or grilled, coated in a tangy, vinegar-based Carolina-style barbecue sauce, which can range from thin and peppery (Eastern style) to slightly sweet with ketchup or mustard (Lexington or SC style).
preparationNotes: Chicken prepared with a tangy, vinegar-forward Carolina BBQ sauce. Typically gluten-free, but inquire if unsure about specific sauce ingredients.
customerGuidance: Tangy and savory Carolina-style BBQ chicken.

name: Rotisserie Chicken
description: Whole chicken seasoned and slow-cooked on a rotisserie, resulting in moist, tender meat and crispy skin.
preparationNotes: Chicken slow-cooked on a rotating spit. Seasonings are typically simple and allergen-friendly, but confirm if concerned.
customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful rotisserie chicken. (Values per approx. 100g serving, mixed meat).

name: Kotopoulo lemonato - Aromatic and lemony baked chicken with fresh herbs
description: A classic Greek dish of tender chicken pieces (often bone-in, skin-on) baked until golden with a vibrant, aromatic sauce of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, and other fresh herbs. Potatoes are often roasted alongside the chicken.
preparationNotes: Chicken baked with a zesty lemon, garlic, and herb sauce. Often served with roasted potatoes cooked in the same pan.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no/minimal added sugar in broth if used)
customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and tender lemon-herb baked chicken.

name: Signature BBQ Glazed Chicken Quarters
description: Chicken leg quarters (thigh and drumstick), slow-cooked or grilled, and generously basted with a signature sweet, smoky, or tangy BBQ glaze until tender and caramelized.
preparationNotes: Juicy chicken quarters with a signature BBQ glaze. Please inquire about glaze ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Tender chicken quarters smothered in our signature BBQ glaze. (Values per quarter).

name: Herb Rotisserie Chicken
description: Whole chicken seasoned generously with a blend of aromatic herbs (such as rosemary, thyme, oregano), garlic, salt, and pepper, then slow-cooked on a rotisserie for exceptionally moist, tender meat and crispy, flavorful skin.
preparationNotes: Chicken slow-cooked on a rotisserie with an aromatic herb seasoning.
customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful herb-infused rotisserie chicken. (Values per 100g serving, mixed meat).

name: Lemon-Herb Marinated Chicken Kebabs
description: Tender pieces of chicken breast marinated in a zesty mixture of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and fresh herbs like oregano, thyme, and parsley, then grilled on skewers until perfectly cooked.
preparationNotes: Juicy grilled chicken infused with bright lemon and aromatic herbs.
customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and healthy lemon-herb chicken kebabs.

name: Beef Pizzaiola with Cremini Mushrooms, Peppers & Oregano
description: Beef (often tougher cuts) simmered until tender in a flavorful tomato sauce resembling pizza sauce, with mushrooms, peppers, oregano, and garlic.
preparationNotes: Slow-cooked beef in a rich, pizza-style tomato sauce with mushrooms and peppers.
customerGuidance: Tender beef simmered in a savory tomato, mushroom, and pepper sauce with Italian herbs.

name: Beef Braciole with Parmesan, Salami & Herb Stuffing
description: Thin slices of beef rolled around a savory stuffing (typically breadcrumbs, Parmesan, salami or prosciutto, herbs, garlic) and simmered in tomato sauce.
preparationNotes: Rolled beef stuffed with cheese, cured meat, and herbs, slow-cooked in tomato sauce.
customerGuidance: Flavorful beef rolls stuffed with a savory mixture, simmered in rich tomato sauce.

name: Brasato Al Barolo with Barolo Wine & Tomato
description: A classic Piedmontese dish of beef (typically chuck roast or similar) slow-braised in Barolo wine with vegetables and often tomato until meltingly tender.
preparationNotes: Beef slow-braised in Barolo wine and tomatoes until exceptionally tender.
customerGuidance: Luxuriously tender beef braised in rich Barolo wine, a true taste of Piedmont.

name: Guinness Braised Boneless Short Ribs
description: Boneless beef short ribs slow-braised in Guinness stout beer along with aromatic vegetables (like onions, carrots, celery) and herbs, resulting in exceptionally tender meat with a rich, deep-flavored sauce.
preparationNotes: Boneless short ribs slow-braised in Guinness stout with aromatic vegetables until meltingly tender.
customerGuidance: Incredibly tender short ribs braised in rich Guinness stout for a deep, savory flavor.

name: Bacon Wrapped Fillet Mignon
description: Tender fillet mignon steak, a prime cut of beef, wrapped in savory bacon and typically grilled or pan-seared to achieve a juicy interior and crispy bacon exterior.
preparationNotes: Beef tenderloin wrapped with bacon, commonly grilled or pan-seared. Cooked to order.
customerGuidance: A luxurious and flavorful classic, combining tender beef with smoky bacon.

name: Flank Steak with Chimichurri
description: Grilled or pan-seared flank steak, a flavorful and relatively lean cut of beef, served with a vibrant, zesty Argentinian chimichurri sauce made from fresh parsley, garlic, vinegar, olive oil, and chili flakes.
preparationNotes: Flank steak typically marinated and grilled, sliced against the grain, and topped with fresh chimichurri sauce.
customerGuidance: Flavorful grilled steak paired with a zesty, herbaceous Argentinian sauce.

name: Kokinisto - Boneless short rib slowly cooked in cinnamon-scented tomato sauce
description: A traditional Greek comfort dish, Kokinisto features tender boneless beef short ribs braised slowly in a rich, aromatic tomato sauce, characteristically scented with cinnamon, cloves, and other warm spices.
preparationNotes: Beef short ribs slow-cooked until meltingly tender in a cinnamon-spiced tomato sauce. Typically served over rice, pasta, or potatoes.
customerGuidance: Tender, aromatic short ribs in a classic Greek cinnamon-tomato sauce.

name: Bifteki Gemisto - Aromatic oven-baked minced beef 'burgers', stuffed with cheese and topped with tomato relish
description: A popular Greek dish of seasoned minced beef patties (biftekia) that are stuffed with cheese (often feta or a melting cheese like kasseri), then oven-baked or grilled. Typically served with a fresh tomato relish or sauce.
preparationNotes: Seasoned beef patties stuffed with cheese, baked or grilled, and served with tomato relish. Please inquire if breadcrumbs or egg are used.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek-style beef patties with a melted cheese center.

name: Beef Tenderloin & Bell Pepper Kebabs
description: Premium cuts of beef tenderloin and colorful bell pepper chunks marinated and grilled on skewers for a tender, juicy, and flavorful kebab.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (if soy sauce used)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if soy sauce/Worcestershire used)
preparationNotes: Tender, high-quality beef with sweet bell peppers, simply grilled. Gluten status depends on marinade.
customerGuidance: Luxurious and flavorful beef tenderloin and pepper kebabs.

name: Lasagna with Beef, Pork & Ricotta
description: Classic Italian-American baked pasta dish with layers of wide lasagna noodles, rich meat sauce (beef and pork), ricotta cheese, mozzarella, and Parmesan.
preparationNotes: Layered pasta with meat sauce, ricotta, mozzarella, and Parmesan, baked until golden.
customerGuidance: A hearty and satisfying classic lasagna layered with rich meat sauce and cheeses.

name: Penne alla Vodka with a Creamy Tomato Sauce
description: A classic Italian-American pasta dish featuring penne pasta tossed in a rich and creamy tomato sauce that is brightened with a splash of vodka, often finished with Parmesan cheese and fresh basil or parsley.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (cream, Parmesan cheese, butter if used)
preparationNotes: Penne pasta in a creamy tomato sauce with a hint of vodka. Contains wheat and dairy. Alcohol is cooked but trace amounts might remain.
customerGuidance: A rich and satisfying pasta dish with a velvety vodka-infused tomato cream sauce.

name: Fettuccine Alfredo enhanced with Black Truffle Oil
description: A luxurious take on the classic Fettuccine Alfredo. Fresh fettuccine pasta is coated in a rich and creamy sauce made from butter, heavy cream, and Parmesan cheese, elevated with the aromatic essence of black truffle oil.
preparationNotes: Indulgent fettuccine in a creamy Alfredo sauce with black truffle oil. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
customerGuidance: An exceptionally rich and aromatic truffle Alfredo pasta experience.

name: Italian Meatballs
description: Classic Italian-American meatballs, typically made from ground beef and/or pork, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, eggs, and herbs, simmered in tomato sauce.
preparationNotes: Savory ground meat meatballs simmered in tomato sauce.
customerGuidance: Tender and flavorful Italian meatballs, perfect for any occasion.

name: Osso Bucco with Root Vegetables & Red Wine
description: A Milanese specialty of cross-cut veal shanks braised with vegetables, white wine, and broth. Often garnished with gremolata.
preparationNotes: Slow-braised veal shanks with root vegetables in a wine-infused broth.
customerGuidance: Tender, fall-off-the-bone veal shanks in a rich, savory sauce with vegetables.

name: Veal Saltimbocca with Prosciutto & Sage
description: The traditional Saltimbocca made with veal cutlets, prosciutto, and fresh sage, pan-fried and often finished with a white wine and butter sauce.
preparationNotes: Veal cutlets layered with prosciutto and sage, pan-fried to perfection.
customerGuidance: An elegant Italian classic: tender veal with savory prosciutto and aromatic sage.

name: Pesce All'Acqua Pazza (Poached Halibut) with Tomatoes, Capers & Lemon
description: 'Fish in crazy water' - a Neapolitan dish of white fish (here, halibut) gently poached in a light, flavorful broth of cherry tomatoes, garlic, parsley, white wine, and a hint of chili.
preparationNotes: Halibut poached in a light, aromatic broth with fresh tomatoes, capers, and lemon.
customerGuidance: Delicate poached halibut in a vibrant, light 'crazy water' broth with tomatoes and capers.

name: Salmon steak
description: A thick cut of salmon, typically grilled, pan-seared, or baked, often seasoned simply to highlight its natural flavor.
preparationNotes: Salmon steak cooked to order. Typically seasoned lightly. Check for any accompanying sauces.
customerGuidance: Flavorful and flaky salmon steak, rich in Omega-3s. (Values per approx. 6oz/170g serving).

name: Psari Plaki - Oven-baked fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
description: A traditional Greek baked fish dish. Psari Plaki features fish fillets (often a firm white fish like cod, snapper, or porgy) baked with a generous topping of sliced tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano.
preparationNotes: Fish fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and flavorful dish.
customerGuidance: Delicate baked fish with fresh Mediterranean flavors.

name: Brizola Solomou - Grilled salmon steaks with fresh herbs, lemon, and evoo
description: Grilled salmon steaks (Brizola Solomou) prepared in a classic Greek style, seasoned with fresh herbs (like oregano, thyme, or dill), fresh lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
preparationNotes: Salmon steaks grilled and seasoned with lemon, olive oil, and fresh Greek herbs.
customerGuidance: Healthy and delicious grilled salmon with classic Greek seasonings.

name: Bakaliaros Plaki - Oven-baked Cod fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
description: Bakaliaros Plaki is a Greek baked cod dish. Cod fish fillets are topped with sliced fresh tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and aromatic fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then baked until tender and flavorful.
preparationNotes: Cod fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and healthy option.
customerGuidance: Tender baked cod with fresh tomato and herb topping.

name: Pan-Seared Salmon with a Delicate Lemon-Dill Sauce
description: Succulent salmon fillet, pan-seared to achieve a crispy skin and moist interior, served with a light and refreshing lemon-dill sauce, often made with butter, white wine, fresh dill, and lemon.
preparationNotes: Pan-seared salmon with a buttery lemon-dill sauce. Contains dairy and potentially sulphites from wine.
customerGuidance: Perfectly seared salmon with a bright and herbaceous lemon-dill sauce.

name: Cedar Plank Roasted Salmon with dill
description: Salmon fillet roasted on a cedar plank, which infuses the fish with a unique smoky flavor. Typically seasoned simply with salt, pepper, lemon, and fresh dill to complement the cedar notes.
preparationNotes: Salmon roasted on a cedar plank for a smoky flavor, seasoned with dill.
customerGuidance: Aromatic cedar plank salmon with a delicate dill accent. (Values per 150-180g serving).

name: Spinach and Ricotta Cannelloni
description: Pasta tubes (cannelloni) filled with a creamy mixture of spinach and ricotta cheese, typically baked in tomato sauce (or béchamel) and topped with Parmesan.
preparationNotes: Pasta tubes filled with spinach and ricotta, baked in sauce with cheese.
customerGuidance: Comforting baked cannelloni filled with creamy spinach and ricotta cheese.

name: Vegetarian Lasagna with Artichoke Hearts & Bechamel Sauce
description: A vegetarian take on lasagna, layered with pasta, artichoke hearts, other vegetables (e.g., spinach, mushrooms), ricotta or other cheeses, and a creamy béchamel sauce.
preparationNotes: Layered pasta with artichoke hearts, vegetables, cheeses, and creamy béchamel sauce.
customerGuidance: A delicious vegetarian lasagna with artichokes and a rich béchamel sauce.

name: Tomato & Gnocchi- with pesto
description: Soft potato gnocchi served with fresh tomatoes (such as cherry or diced) and a vibrant basil pesto sauce. A flavorful vegetarian pasta dish.
preparationNotes: Soft potato gnocchi tossed with tomatoes and basil pesto. Contains wheat, dairy, and pine nuts. Egg is commonly used in gnocchi.
customerGuidance: A delightful dish of soft gnocchi, fresh tomatoes, and aromatic pesto.

name: Eggplant Parmesan
description: A classic Italian-American dish with layers of fried or baked eggplant slices, tomato sauce, mozzarella, Parmesan, and basil.
preparationNotes: Layers of eggplant, tomato sauce, and cheeses, baked until bubbly.
customerGuidance: Comforting and classic eggplant Parmesan with rich tomato sauce and melted cheese.

name: Grilled Halloumi & Vegetable Kebabs (Vegetarian)
description: Vegetarian skewers featuring cubes of salty halloumi cheese and a colorful array of seasonal vegetables like bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and red onion, grilled until the halloumi is golden and the vegetables are tender-crisp.
preparationNotes: Salty grilled halloumi paired with sweet, charred vegetables.
customerGuidance: A delicious vegetarian option: grilled halloumi and colorful vegetable kebabs.

name: Tossed Italian Cobb Salad
description: An Italian twist on the classic Cobb salad, typically featuring mixed greens, grilled chicken or salami, hard-boiled eggs, tomatoes, avocado, olives, and an Italian vinaigrette.
preparationNotes: A hearty salad with Italian meats/chicken, eggs, vegetables, and vinaigrette.
customerGuidance: A substantial and flavorful Italian-inspired Cobb salad.

name: Cabbage Rolls with rice, dried figs, pine nuts, and aromatic herbs
description: Tender cabbage leaves wrapped around a savory filling of rice, dried figs, toasted pine nuts, and aromatic herbs, often simmered in a light broth or tomato sauce.
preparationNotes: Cabbage leaves stuffed with a fragrant mixture of rice, figs, pine nuts, and herbs.
customerGuidance: Delicate cabbage rolls with a unique sweet and savory filling.

name: Eggplant Imam Baildi, sumptuously topped with stewed tomato and peppers
description: A classic Turkish dish where eggplants are slit and stuffed with a mixture of onions, garlic, tomatoes, peppers, and various spices, then slowly baked in olive oil until very tender. The name famously means 'the Imam fainted', supposedly due to its deliciousness or the amount of olive oil used.
preparationNotes: Slow-baked eggplants stuffed with a rich filling of tomatoes, onions, garlic, and peppers in olive oil.
customerGuidance: Melt-in-your-mouth eggplant stuffed with a savory tomato and vegetable mixture, a Turkish classic.

name: Indian Style Stuffed Peppers with fragrant curried chickpeas
description: Bell peppers stuffed with a flavorful Indian-spiced mixture, typically featuring curried chickpeas, rice or quinoa, vegetables like onions and tomatoes, and aromatic spices.
preparationNotes: Bell peppers filled with a fragrant, curried chickpea and vegetable stuffing.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Indian-spiced stuffed peppers with a hearty curried chickpea filling.

name: Stuffed Portabella Mushrooms with hearty stewed lentils
description: Large portabella mushroom caps roasted or grilled and filled with a savory and hearty stuffing of stewed lentils, vegetables, and herbs.
preparationNotes: Portabella mushrooms filled with a savory stewed lentil and vegetable mixture.
customerGuidance: Meaty portabella mushrooms with a satisfying and flavorful lentil stuffing.

name: Wild Rice Stuffed Acorn Squash, a harvest delight
description: Roasted acorn squash halves filled with a flavorful stuffing of wild rice, often mixed with other ingredients like cranberries, pecans, mushrooms, onions, celery, and herbs.
preparationNotes: Roasted acorn squash filled with a savory wild rice, fruit, and nut stuffing.
customerGuidance: A festive and flavorful stuffed acorn squash, perfect for a hearty meal.

name: Greek Style Stuffed Peppers with aromatic jasmine rice
description: Bell peppers (Yemistes) filled with a savory Greek-inspired mixture of aromatic jasmine rice, onions, tomatoes, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes raisins or pine nuts, then baked.
preparationNotes: Bell peppers stuffed with aromatic rice, tomatoes, and fresh Greek herbs.
customerGuidance: Classic Greek stuffed peppers with a fragrant and herby rice filling.

name: Artichoke Ala Polita with a vibrant lemon tahini sauce
description: A Greek dish ('Artichokes a la City style') where artichoke hearts are stewed with potatoes, carrots, onions, dill, and lemon juice. This version adds a lemon tahini sauce for extra vibrancy.
category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
preparationNotes: Stewed artichokes with potatoes and carrots, served with a lemon tahini sauce.
customerGuidance: A hearty Greek artichoke stew brightened with a zesty lemon tahini sauce.

name: Fasolakia (Greek green beans stewed with tomatoes)
description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (Fasolakia Lathera) where fresh green beans are braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, potatoes (often), and herbs like parsley or dill until very tender.
category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
preparationNotes: Green beans and often potatoes slow-cooked in a rich tomato and olive oil sauce.
customerGuidance: Comforting Greek stewed green beans in a savory tomato and olive oil base.

name: Spicy Tofu Vindaloo, full of bold flavors
description: A vegetarian/vegan take on the fiery Goan curry, Vindaloo, made with firm tofu marinated and simmered in a spicy and tangy sauce of vinegar, garlic, ginger, chilies, and a blend of aromatic spices.
preparationNotes: Tofu simmered in a very spicy and tangy Vindaloo curry sauce.
customerGuidance: A fiery and flavorful tofu Vindaloo for those who love a spicy kick.

name: Vegan Moussaka with stewed lentils and creamy cauliflower béchamel
description: A plant-based version of the classic Greek layered casserole Moussaka. This version features layers of potatoes, eggplant, a rich stewed lentil ragu, and is topped with a creamy dairy-free béchamel sauce made from cauliflower.
preparationNotes: Layered casserole of eggplant, potatoes, spiced lentil ragu, and creamy cauliflower béchamel.
customerGuidance: A hearty and comforting vegan Moussaka with rich lentils and a creamy cauliflower topping.

name: Stuffed Poblano Peppers with savory rice and beans
description: Mild poblano peppers roasted and stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, black beans, corn, tomatoes, onions, and spices, often topped with cheese or a vegan alternative.
preparationNotes: Roasted poblano peppers filled with a flavorful rice, bean, and corn mixture.
customerGuidance: Flavorful and satisfying stuffed poblano peppers with a savory rice and bean filling.

name: Moroccan Wild Rice Pilaf with dried fruits and nuts
description: A fragrant wild rice pilaf infused with Moroccan flavors, featuring ingredients like dried fruits (apricots, raisins, dates), toasted nuts (almonds, pistachios), onions, garlic, and warm spices (cinnamon, cumin, turmeric, ginger).
preparationNotes: Aromatic wild rice pilaf with Moroccan spices, dried fruits, and nuts.
customerGuidance: An exotic and flavorful Moroccan wild rice pilaf with sweet and savory notes.

name: Crispy Falafel with tahini drizzle
description: Deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas and/or fava beans, herbs, and spices. Served crispy, often with a drizzle of tahini sauce.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (if wheat flour used as binder, verify if chickpea flour only)
preparationNotes: Crispy fried patties of ground chickpeas and herbs, served with tahini sauce.
customerGuidance: Deliciously crispy falafel made from chickpeas and herbs, drizzled with tahini. (Nutritional values approximate per piece)

name: Kale and Quinoa Salad with lemon-tahini dressing
description: A nutritious salad combining hearty kale (often massaged), cooked quinoa, and other additions like chickpeas, avocado, nuts, or seeds, all tossed in a creamy lemon-tahini dressing.
preparationNotes: Nutrient-dense salad with kale, quinoa, and a creamy lemon-tahini dressing.
customerGuidance: A wholesome and satisfying kale and quinoa salad with a zesty lemon-tahini dressing.

name: Barbacoa
description: Traditionally, barbacoa refers to meat (often beef, lamb, or goat) slow-cooked until tender, typically seasoned with chilies and spices. In modern Mexican-American cuisine, beef barbacoa often involves beef cheeks or chuck roast slow-cooked with chipotle peppers, cumin, cloves, and other seasonings.
preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and flavorful shredded beef seasoned with chilies and spices.
customerGuidance: Rich, savory, and tender slow-cooked barbacoa beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

name: Pork Carnitas
description: A Mexican dish of pork (often shoulder or butt) slow-cooked until very tender, then typically shredded and crisped up. Seasoned with ingredients like oranges, lime, onion, garlic, and spices.
preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and crispy shredded pork with citrus and spice notes.
customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful slow-cooked pork carnitas. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

name: Pork Belly
description: A boneless cut of fatty meat from the belly of a pig. When cooked (e.g., roasted, braised, seared), it's known for its rich flavor, tender meat, and often crispy skin.
preparationNotes: Rich and succulent pork belly, preparation style varies.
customerGuidance: Indulgent and flavorful pork belly. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz, can vary significantly)

name: Flank steak Fajitas
description: A popular Tex-Mex dish consisting of grilled strips of marinated flank steak, typically served sizzling with sautéed bell peppers and onions. Often accompanied by tortillas, salsa, guacamole, and sour cream.
dietaryFlags: GLUTEN_FREE_OPTION (if served without flour tortillas or with corn tortillas)
preparationNotes: Grilled marinated flank steak strips with sautéed peppers and onions.
customerGuidance: Sizzling flank steak fajitas with colorful peppers and onions. (Nutritional values for steak & vegetables, excludes tortillas/sides)

name: Ground Beef
description: Seasoned cooked ground beef, often served as a protein option for tacos, bowls, or salads. Seasonings typically include chili powder, cumin, garlic, and onion powder.
preparationNotes: Seasoned and cooked ground beef.
customerGuidance: Savory seasoned ground beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

name: Chorizo
description: A type of pork sausage, typically seasoned with paprika, garlic, and other spices. Can be fresh (requiring cooking) or cured (ready to eat). Mexican chorizo is usually fresh and spicy; Spanish chorizo is often smoked and cured.
preparationNotes: Spicy and savory pork sausage.
customerGuidance: Flavorful and often spicy chorizo sausage. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 3-4oz)

name: Mexican Chicken
description: Cooked chicken seasoned with Mexican-inspired spices like cumin, chili powder, paprika, oregano, garlic, and onion. Often shredded or diced for use in tacos, burritos, salads, or bowls.
preparationNotes: Flavorfully seasoned cooked chicken with Mexican spices.
customerGuidance: Tender and savory Mexican-spiced chicken. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

name: Beef Birria
description: A traditional Mexican stew, typically made with goat meat, but beef birria is also very popular. The meat is slow-cooked in a rich, savory broth flavored with various chilies (e.g., guajillo, ancho), garlic, cumin, bay leaves, and other spices. Often served as a stew or as taco filling, with consommé on the side.
preparationNotes: Tender, slow-cooked beef in a rich and aromatic chili-spiced broth.
customerGuidance: Deeply savory and tender beef birria, perfect in tacos or as a stew. (Nutritional values per serving of meat)

name: Cod
description: A mild, white fish. As a menu item, it's typically cooked by methods like baking, grilling, pan-searing, or frying, and can be seasoned simply or served with various sauces.
preparationNotes: Cooked cod fillet; preparation method (e.g., baked, grilled) determines final characteristics.
customerGuidance: Mild and flaky cod, cooked to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked cod, e.g., 4oz)

name: Grilled Mahi-Mahi with lime
description: Firm, white-fleshed Mahi-Mahi fillets, grilled until tender and flaky, served with a zesty touch of fresh lime. A light and healthy seafood option.
preparationNotes: Grilled Mahi-Mahi seasoned with lime. A simple and healthy preparation.
customerGuidance: Light and flaky grilled Mahi-Mahi with a refreshing lime accent. (Values per 150g serving).

name: Shrimp
description: Cooked shrimp, often served as a protein add-on or main component. Preparation can vary (e.g., grilled, sautéed, boiled) and may include various seasonings.
preparationNotes: Cooked shrimp; preparation method determines final characteristics.
customerGuidance: Succulent cooked shrimp. (Nutritional values for plain cooked shrimp, e.g., 4oz)

name: Tofu
description: Soybean curd, a versatile plant-based protein. As a menu item, it's typically prepared in various ways (e.g., grilled, baked, pan-fried, scrambled) and can be seasoned or marinated.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (in some marinades/soy sauces - verify if GF needed)
preparationNotes: Prepared tofu; specific flavor profile depends on seasoning and cooking method.
customerGuidance: Versatile plant-based tofu, prepared to order. (Nutritional values for plain cooked tofu, e.g., 4oz, before heavy sauces/marinades)

name: Rice and Beans
description: A staple dish in many cultures, typically consisting of cooked rice served with cooked beans (e.g., black beans, pinto beans, kidney beans). Seasonings and preparation methods vary widely by region.
preparationNotes: A combination of cooked rice and beans; preparation style varies.
customerGuidance: A hearty and nutritious serving of rice and beans. (Nutritional values per serving)

name: Prime Rib - Boneless -Carving station
description: A tender and flavorful cut of beef from the primal rib, slow-roasted to perfection. Served from a carving station, typically boneless.
preparationNotes: Slow-roasted boneless prime rib, carved to order.
customerGuidance: Succulent slow-roasted prime rib, carved fresh. (Nutritional values per slice, e.g., 4-6oz, varies by thickness)

name: Smoked Brisket
description: Beef brisket that has been slow-smoked for many hours until exceptionally tender and flavorful, often with a signature smoky aroma and a dark 'bark' on the outside.
preparationNotes: Slow-smoked beef brisket, tender and rich in flavor.
customerGuidance: Tender, smoky, and flavorful slow-smoked beef brisket. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4-6oz)

name: Beef Ribs
description: Large, meaty beef ribs (often back ribs or short ribs) typically slow-cooked, either smoked, braised, or roasted, until tender and falling off the bone. Often coated in a BBQ sauce or spice rub.
allergenAlerts: ALLERGENS_IN_BBQ_SAUCE_VARY (e.g., soy, gluten - verify if sauced)
preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender beef ribs, often with a spice rub or BBQ sauce.
customerGuidance: Hearty and flavorful slow-cooked beef ribs. (Nutritional values per serving, varies by size and saucing)

name: Lamb Chops
description: Tender and flavorful lamb chops, often grilled, pan-seared, or broiled, typically seasoned with aromatic herbs like rosemary, thyme, and garlic.
preparationNotes: Lamb chops seasoned and cooked to highlight their natural flavor, usually served medium-rare to medium unless otherwise requested.
customerGuidance: Succulent, herb-seasoned lamb chops, cooked to your preference.

name: Smoked Leg of Lamb (Family Style only)
description: A whole leg of lamb, slow-smoked until tender and flavorful, often infused with smoky aromas and spices. Served family style.
preparationNotes: Leg of lamb, seasoned and slow-smoked for tenderness and rich flavor. Ideal for sharing.
customerGuidance: Tender, smoky, and perfect for sharing. (Values per approx. 150g serving).

name: Kleftiko - (Family style only) Boldly seasoned lamb roast that cooks with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, low and slow for 6 hours, in a parchment paper pouch
description: A traditional Greek celebratory lamb dish. Lamb (often leg or shoulder) is boldly seasoned with garlic, oregano, and lemon, then slow-roasted for hours in a parchment paper pouch along with new potatoes, celery, and carrots, sealing in all the juices and flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (potentially, if feta cheese is included, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Lamb slow-roasted in parchment paper with potatoes and vegetables for exceptional tenderness. Served family style. Inquire if feta cheese is part of this specific recipe.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no cheese and specific preparation)
customerGuidance: Succulent, slow-cooked lamb and vegetables, bursting with flavor. Perfect for sharing.

name: Paidakia - These Greek lamb chops are marinated in a mix of olive oil, lemon juice, garlic and oregano and grilled to perfection
description: Paidakia are succulent Greek-style lamb chops, typically marinated in a classic mixture of extra virgin olive oil, fresh lemon juice, minced garlic, and dried oregano, then grilled over high heat to achieve a flavorful char and tender interior.
preparationNotes: Lamb chops marinated in olive oil, lemon, garlic, and oregano, then grilled. Cooked to order.
customerGuidance: Classic Greek grilled lamb chops – intensely flavorful and tender.

name: Kotsi Arni - Slowly roasted lamb shank with tomato, herbs and robust spices such as cinnamon and clove
description: A hearty Greek dish of lamb shanks (Kotsi Arni) slowly roasted or braised until fall-off-the-bone tender in a rich sauce, often tomato-based, and flavored with herbs and robust warm spices like cinnamon and cloves.
preparationNotes: Lamb shanks slow-cooked in a tomato and spice-infused sauce until exceptionally tender. Often served with orzo, mashed potatoes, or rice.
customerGuidance: Fork-tender lamb shanks in a rich, aromatic Greek-style sauce.

name: Grilled Herb Lamb Chops
description: Tender lamb chops marinated in a blend of fresh herbs (such as rosemary, thyme, oregano), garlic, olive oil, and lemon juice, then grilled to perfection, offering a fragrant char and juicy interior.
preparationNotes: Lamb chops marinated in fresh herbs, garlic, and lemon, then grilled.
customerGuidance: Fragrant and flavorful grilled lamb chops with fresh herbs. (Values per 2-3 chops).

name: Spiced Lamb Kofta Kebabs
description: Ground lamb seasoned with aromatic spices like cumin, coriander, garlic, onion, and fresh herbs (parsley, mint), formed onto skewers and grilled until succulent and flavorful.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if breadcrumbs used as binder)
preparationNotes: Flavorful and aromatic minced lamb kebabs, grilled to perfection. Check for egg/wheat if allergies.
customerGuidance: Aromatic and juicy spiced lamb kofta kebabs.

name: Sausage Medley
description: An assortment of different types of cooked sausages, offering a variety of flavors and textures. May include bratwurst, Italian sausage, kielbasa, or other regional specialties.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (potentially in some sausages, e.g. cheese-filled)
CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in some sausages as filler)
preparationNotes: A mix of different sausages, typically grilled or pan-fried. Inquire about today's selection for specific types and potential allergens.
customerGuidance: A hearty selection of various cooked sausages. Please ask about today's specific sausage types and ingredients.

name: Hamburger Bar
description: A customizable hamburger experience where guests can build their own burger with a selection of patties, buns, cheeses, fresh toppings, and sauces.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in some buns or patties)
preparationNotes: Interactive station for assembling personalized hamburgers. Gluten-free buns or lettuce wraps may be available upon request.
customerGuidance: Build your perfect burger! Many toppings and choices available. Please inquire about dietary options.

name: Pulled Pork
description: Slow-cooked pork shoulder, shredded and typically mixed with a tangy or sweet barbecue sauce.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (potentially in BBQ sauce or vinegar components)
preparationNotes: Pork shoulder slow-cooked until tender, then shredded and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Tender, smoky pulled pork, a BBQ classic. (Values per approx. 150g serving).

name: Baby Back Ribs
description: Tender, fall-off-the-bone baby back pork ribs, typically slow-cooked and glazed with a sweet and tangy barbecue sauce.
preparationNotes: Pork ribs slow-cooked, often smoked or baked, then grilled with BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Classic tender BBQ baby back ribs. (Values per half-rack serving).

name: Bone-in, thick-cut, Grilled Pork Chop with Korean BBQ glaze
description: A substantial, bone-in, thick-cut pork chop, grilled to perfection and finished with a savory and slightly sweet Korean BBQ glaze.
preparationNotes: Thick-cut pork chop grilled and glazed with a Korean BBQ sauce typically containing soy sauce, gochujang, and sesame oil.
customerGuidance: Juicy grilled pork chop with a flavorful Korean BBQ twist.

name: St. Louis Style Baby Back Ribs
description: St. Louis style ribs are pork spare ribs that have had the breastbone, cartilage and rib tips removed to create a more uniform, rectangular rack. They are meatier than baby backs and are typically slow-cooked (smoked or baked) and glazed with BBQ sauce.
preparationNotes: Meaty St. Louis style pork ribs, slow-cooked and basted with BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Tender and flavorful St. Louis style BBQ ribs. (Values per 3-4 rib serving).

name: Pork Tenderloin & Apricot Kebabs with rosemary glaze
description: Succulent pieces of pork tenderloin and sweet dried apricots threaded onto skewers, grilled, and basted with a fragrant rosemary-infused glaze.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (if soy sauce used in glaze)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if soy sauce used in glaze is not tamari)
May contain CONTAINS_HONEY (if used in glaze)
preparationNotes: Tender pork and sweet apricots with an aromatic rosemary glaze. Gluten status depends on glaze.
customerGuidance: Sweet and savory grilled pork and apricot kebabs with a rosemary touch.

name: Smoked pork Belly
description: Rich and succulent pork belly, slow-smoked to achieve a tender texture and often a crispy exterior or skin.
preparationNotes: Pork belly, typically salt-cured or brined, then slow-smoked. May be served as slices or cubes. Check if any glaze is used.
customerGuidance: Indulgently rich and flavorful smoked pork belly. (Values per approx. 100g serving).

name: BBQ Prawns
description: Large prawns (shrimp) grilled or pan-seared and coated in a flavorful barbecue sauce.
preparationNotes: Prawns cooked and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Succulent BBQ prawns with a smoky, sweet, or tangy glaze.

name: BBQ Black Tiger Prawns
description: Large, meaty Black Tiger prawns grilled or pan-seared and basted with barbecue sauce.
preparationNotes: Black Tiger prawns cooked and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Large, flavorful Black Tiger prawns with a delicious BBQ glaze.

name: Jumbo BBQ Prawn Skewers
description: Large, succulent jumbo prawns (shrimp) threaded onto skewers, marinated or basted with a flavorful barbecue sauce, then grilled until perfectly cooked with a slight char.
preparationNotes: Jumbo prawns grilled on skewers with BBQ sauce. Please inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Plump and flavorful jumbo BBQ prawn skewers. (Values per skewer, approx 3-4 prawns).

name: Chicken
description: Chicken, typically breast or thigh meat, prepared simply such as grilled, roasted, or pan-seared. Offered as a protein option.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared chicken. Please inquire about the specific cut (e.g., breast, thigh) and any marinades or glazes used today.
customerGuidance: Versatile chicken protein option. (Values for 100g cooked boneless, skinless chicken breast).

name: Pork Tenderloin
description: A lean, tender, and flavorful cut of pork, typically roasted, grilled, or pan-seared. Offered as a versatile protein choice, prepared to highlight its natural taste.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared pork tenderloin. Please inquire about any specific marinades or glazes used for today's preparation.
customerGuidance: Lean and tender pork tenderloin, a versatile protein choice. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Beef Tenderloin
description: A prime cut of beef known for its exceptional tenderness, typically grilled, roasted, or pan-seared. Offered as a premium protein choice.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared beef tenderloin. Please inquire about any specific marinades or sauces used today.
customerGuidance: Exceptionally tender beef tenderloin. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Beef Flank
description: A lean and flavorful cut of beef, known for its robust taste. Typically grilled or broiled and often sliced against the grain. Offered as a protein option.
preparationNotes: Flavorful beef flank steak. Please inquire about any specific marinades used today (e.g., soy sauce in some marinades could add wheat/soy allergens).
customerGuidance: Lean and flavorful beef flank. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Lamb
description: Tender and flavorful lamb, prepared simply (e.g., grilled, roasted) to highlight its distinct taste. Offered as a protein option. Specific cut may vary (e.g., chops, cubed, ground).
preparationNotes: Simply prepared lamb. Please inquire about the specific cut and any marinades used today.
customerGuidance: Flavorful lamb protein option. (Values for generic cooked lamb, 100g serving).

name: Swordfish
description: A firm, meaty, and mild-flavored fish, typically grilled or pan-seared. Offered as a protein option.
preparationNotes: Simply prepared swordfish steak. Please inquire about any specific marinades or sauces used today.
customerGuidance: Firm and meaty swordfish steak. (Values per 100g cooked serving).

name: Papoutsakia - Classic moussaka in individual hollowed eggplant shells with seasoned ground beef and topped with creamy bechamel
description: A traditional Greek dish, 'Papoutsakia' means 'little shoes'. It consists of baked eggplant halves stuffed with a savory ground meat (typically beef or lamb) and tomato sauce, then topped with a creamy béchamel sauce and baked until golden.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (milk, butter, cheese in béchamel and topping)
preparationNotes: Baked stuffed eggplants with seasoned ground meat and a rich béchamel topping, similar to individual moussakas.
customerGuidance: Delicious Greek 'little shoes' – savory meat-stuffed eggplants topped with creamy béchamel.

name: Soutzoukakia - Plump oblong-shaped meatballs are packed with loads of aromatics and fresh herbs, smothered in a cinnamon wine-enhanced tomato sauce
description: Soutzoukakia Smyrneika are Greek baked meatballs from Smyrna, characterized by their oblong shape and rich, aromatic tomato sauce flavored with cumin, cinnamon, and wine.
preparationNotes: Aromatic, oblong meatballs baked in a rich tomato sauce spiced with cumin and cinnamon.
customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek meatballs in a unique cinnamon and wine-infused tomato sauce.

name: Classic Moussaka with layers of eggplant, meat, and béchamel
description: A rich, baked Greek casserole made with layers of sautéed eggplant, spiced ground meat (typically lamb or beef) cooked in a tomato sauce, and topped with a thick, creamy béchamel sauce.
preparationNotes: A hearty and iconic Greek dish with distinct layers of eggplant, spiced meat, and creamy topping.
customerGuidance: The ultimate Greek comfort food: rich, layered Moussaka.

name: Pastitsio - Classic baked pasta dish with cinnamon-scented ground meat and creamy béchamel sauce
description: A beloved Greek baked pasta casserole. Pastitsio features layers of long tubular pasta (like bucatini or special Pastitsio pasta), a rich, cinnamon-spiced ground meat sauce (typically beef or a mix), and is topped with a thick, creamy béchamel sauce and often a sprinkle of cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if wine is used in meat sauce)
preparationNotes: A hearty layered baked pasta dish with spiced meat sauce and creamy béchamel. Contains wheat, dairy, and egg.
customerGuidance: The ultimate Greek comfort food – rich, creamy, and satisfying.

name: Aginares Ala Polita - Vegan option - Artichoke hearts braised with potatoes and carrots and finished with a creamy egg-lemon sauce and fresh dill
description: A traditional Greek vegan dish (Aginares A La Polita) featuring tender artichoke hearts braised with potatoes, carrots, onions, and abundant fresh dill in a light, lemony olive oil broth. The 'creamy egg-lemon sauce' mentioned in the name for this vegan option is prepared using plant-based ingredients to achieve creaminess, or refers to the lemony broth itself, without actual egg or dairy.
preparationNotes: A hearty vegan stew of artichokes, potatoes, and carrots in a lemony dill sauce. The dish is confirmed vegan, any 'creamy sauce' effect is achieved without animal products.
customerGuidance: A flavorful and satisfying vegan Greek stew with artichokes and vegetables.

name: Gemista - Vegan Oven-baked stuffed tomatoes and peppers with rice, and fresh herbs
description: Gemista (or Yemista) are traditional Greek vegetables, typically tomatoes and bell peppers, hollowed out and stuffed with a flavorful mixture of rice, onions, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes pine nuts or currants, then baked until tender in olive oil.
preparationNotes: Oven-baked tomatoes and peppers stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek dish. Some recipes include pine nuts; please confirm if nut allergies are a concern.
customerGuidance: Flavorful rice-stuffed vegetables, a taste of Greek summer. (Values per 1 large stuffed vegetable).

name: Smoky BBQ Tofu Skewers (Vegan)
description: Firm tofu cubes marinated in a smoky barbecue sauce, threaded onto skewers (often with vegetables like bell peppers and onions), and grilled or baked until caramelized and flavorful. A satisfying vegan BBQ option.
preparationNotes: Tofu skewers with smoky BBQ sauce. Please inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns (wheat/soy).
customerGuidance: Deliciously smoky and savory BBQ tofu skewers. (Values per 2 skewers).

name: Octapodi - Spanish octopus slowly braised and served simply with lemon juice, EVOO, and fresh oregano
description: Tender Spanish octopus, slowly braised to perfection, then often finished on the grill for a slight char. Served in a classic Greek style, dressed simply with fresh lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil (EVOO), and fresh oregano.
preparationNotes: Octopus braised until tender, then typically grilled and dressed with lemon, olive oil, and oregano.
customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful braised and grilled octopus, a Greek delicacy. (Values per 100g serving).

name: Falafel
description: Crispy, deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas (or fava beans), fresh herbs like parsley and cilantro, and spices. A popular Middle Eastern street food.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (potentially, if flour is used as a binder, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Deep-fried spiced chickpea patties. Often gluten-free, but please confirm if flour is used in the mixture.
customerGuidance: Crispy and flavorful chickpea fritters. (Values per falafel ball).

name: Creamy Saffron Risotto Milanese
description: A classic Northern Italian risotto dish from Milan, known for its vibrant yellow color from saffron threads. Made with Arborio or Carnaroli rice, slowly cooked in broth, and enriched with butter, Parmesan cheese, and often white wine and beef bone marrow (though marrow is less common in many modern recipes).
category: Side Dish / Main Course - Vegetarian (if veg broth)
preparationNotes: Rich and creamy saffron-infused risotto. Contains dairy. Vegetarian if made with vegetable broth and without bone marrow; please inquire.
customerGuidance: Luxurious and aromatic saffron risotto from Milan. (Values per serving).

name: Lobster Ravioli in a Delicate Saffron Cream Sauce
description: Elegant lobster-filled ravioli served in a luxurious and delicately flavored saffron cream sauce, often garnished with fresh herbs.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (ravioli pasta, potentially breadcrumbs in filling)
CONTAINS_DAIRY (cream, butter, Parmesan, potentially cheese in filling)
preparationNotes: Lobster-filled ravioli in a saffron cream sauce. Contains shellfish, wheat, egg, and dairy. Please inquire about specific filling ingredients for additional allergens.
customerGuidance: An exquisite dish of lobster ravioli with a fragrant saffron cream sauce.

name: Chipotle Chicken Tinga
description: A traditional Mexican dish made with shredded chicken simmered in a smoky, spicy tomato sauce flavored with chipotle peppers in adobo, onions, and garlic. Often served in tacos, tostadas, or as a filling.
preparationNotes: Shredded chicken in a smoky chipotle tomato sauce. Check adobo sauce for specific soy/wheat content.
customerGuidance: Smoky and spicy shredded chipotle chicken. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Garlic-Lime Sautéed Shrimp
description: Succulent shrimp quickly sautéed in olive oil or butter with minced garlic and a generous squeeze of fresh lime juice, often finished with fresh cilantro or parsley.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cooked with butter, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Shrimp sautéed with garlic and lime. Ask if butter is used if dairy is a concern.
customerGuidance: Zesty and flavorful garlic-lime shrimp. (Values per 100g serving).

name: Adobo Spiced Tofu Crumbles (Vegan)
description: Firm tofu, crumbled and seasoned with a savory and tangy adobo spice blend (typically including paprika, oregano, garlic powder, onion powder, and sometimes chili powder or cumin), then pan-fried or baked until slightly browned. A versatile vegan protein.
preparationNotes: Flavorful adobo-spiced tofu crumbles. Ensure adobo seasoning is free from unwanted additives if concerned.
customerGuidance: Savory and versatile adobo-spiced tofu crumbles. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

name: Gourmet Slider Bar (Beef, Chicken, Veggie)
description: A customizable slider bar offering a variety of mini patties (beef, chicken, veggie options) with an assortment of gourmet buns, cheeses, sauces, and toppings for guests to create their own unique sliders.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (potentially in some gourmet sauces or veggie patties, please inquire)
preparationNotes: Interactive slider station with various patties and toppings. Dietary suitability depends on choices. Inquire about specific ingredients for patties, buns, and sauces.
customerGuidance: Create your own gourmet sliders! Many options available. (Values per slider, highly variable).

name: Smoked Pork Belly Burnt Ends
description: Cubes of rich pork belly, slow-smoked until tender, then often tossed in a sweet and tangy BBQ sauce or glaze and returned to the smoker or oven to caramelize, creating flavorful 'burnt ends'.
preparationNotes: Tender, smoky, and caramelized cubes of pork belly. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
customerGuidance: Indulgent bites of smoky, caramelized pork belly. (Values per 2-3 pieces/small serving).

name: Mediterranean Swordfish Kebabs with olives & capers
description: Firm swordfish steaks cut into chunks, marinated with olive oil, lemon, oregano, garlic, and studded with Kalamata olives and capers, then grilled on skewers for a taste of the Mediterranean Sea.
preparationNotes: Robust swordfish infused with briny olives, capers, and Mediterranean herbs.
customerGuidance: Flavorful and meaty Mediterranean swordfish kebabs.

name: Garlic & Herb Shrimp Skewers
description: Plump shrimp marinated in a vibrant mixture of garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then threaded onto skewers and grilled until pink and succulent.
preparationNotes: Quickly grilled shrimp with a potent garlic and herb marinade.
customerGuidance: Juicy and aromatic garlic and herb grilled shrimp skewers.

name: Tofu Satay Skewers with peanut sauce (Vegan)
description: Firm tofu cubes marinated in a savory and aromatic satay-style blend (often including soy sauce, lime, ginger, garlic, turmeric, and coconut milk), then grilled or baked and served with a creamy peanut dipping sauce.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if traditional soy sauce is used - tamari for GF)
preparationNotes: Flavorful grilled tofu with a rich and creamy peanut dipping sauce. Ensure tamari is used for gluten-free if needed.
customerGuidance: Deliciously savory and nutty vegan tofu satay skewers.

name: Breakfast Burrito - Tex-Mex
description: A hearty breakfast burrito filled with scrambled eggs, seasoned meat (often chorizo or spiced ground beef), cheese, and Tex-Mex inspired ingredients like salsa, beans, and sometimes avocado or potatoes, all wrapped in a warm flour tortilla.
preparationNotes: Features scrambled eggs, seasoned meat, and cheese with Southwestern spices and fillings, wrapped in a flour tortilla.
customerGuidance: A flavorful and satisfying burrito to kickstart your day with a Tex-Mex twist.

name: Breakfast Burrito - Baconator
description: A breakfast burrito packed with a generous amount of bacon, scrambled eggs, cheese, and potentially other complementary fillings like potatoes or onions, all wrapped in a flour tortilla.
preparationNotes: Emphasizes a high bacon content alongside standard breakfast burrito components.
customerGuidance: For the ultimate bacon lover, this burrito is loaded with crispy bacon.

name: Breakfast Burrito - The Cali
description: A California-style breakfast burrito typically featuring eggs, cheese, potatoes (often French fries), salsa or pico de gallo, and avocado or guacamole, wrapped in a flour tortilla. Meat such as bacon or sausage may also be included.
preparationNotes: Distinguished by the inclusion of potatoes (often fries) and avocado/guacamole. Confirm meat content if vegetarian.
customerGuidance: A taste of California with fries and avocado in your breakfast burrito.

name: Breakfast Burrito- The Greek (vegetarian)
description: A vegetarian breakfast burrito inspired by Greek flavors, typically containing scrambled eggs, feta cheese, spinach, tomatoes, onions, and Kalamata olives, wrapped in a flour tortilla.
preparationNotes: A Mediterranean twist on the breakfast burrito with classic Greek vegetable and feta cheese fillings.
customerGuidance: A refreshing vegetarian burrito with spinach, feta, and Mediterranean vegetables.

name: Croisandwich - Caprese (Vegetarian)
description: A flaky croissant sandwich filled with classic Caprese ingredients: fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and basil, often drizzled with balsamic glaze.
preparationNotes: A light and flavorful vegetarian option featuring mozzarella, tomato, and basil in a buttery croissant.
customerGuidance: A delightful Italian-inspired vegetarian croissant sandwich.

name: Croisandwich - Egg salad
description: A croissant filled with creamy egg salad, typically made with chopped hard-boiled eggs, mayonnaise, and seasonings.
preparationNotes: Classic egg salad served in a buttery croissant.
customerGuidance: A comforting classic: creamy egg salad nestled in a flaky croissant.

name: Croisandwich - Turkey Club
description: A club-style sandwich served on a croissant, featuring sliced turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise.
preparationNotes: A classic turkey club combination served in a croissant for a richer taste.
customerGuidance: A delicious and satisfying turkey club with a buttery croissant upgrade.

name: Croisandwich - Gravlax (Cured Salmon)
description: An elegant croissant sandwich featuring gravlax (Scandinavian cured salmon), often accompanied by cream cheese, dill, and sometimes capers or red onion.
preparationNotes: Delicate cured salmon and cream cheese on a flaky croissant for a sophisticated choice.
customerGuidance: A luxurious croissant with thinly sliced cured salmon and cream cheese.

name: Quiche - Lorraine
description: A classic French tart consisting of a pastry crust filled with a savory custard made from eggs, cream, bacon, and often Swiss or Gruyère cheese.
preparationNotes: A rich and savory egg custard tart with bacon and cheese in a buttery crust.
customerGuidance: The quintessential French quiche, rich with bacon, eggs, and cheese.

name: Quiche - Greek (Vegetarian)
description: A vegetarian quiche with Greek-inspired fillings such as spinach, feta cheese, Kalamata olives, tomatoes, and herbs, in a savory egg custard and pastry crust.
preparationNotes: A flavorful vegetarian quiche featuring spinach, feta, olives, and other Mediterranean ingredients.
customerGuidance: Enjoy Mediterranean flavors in this hearty vegetarian spinach and feta quiche.

name: Mexican Quiche
description: A quiche with Mexican-inspired flavors, often including ingredients like chorizo, jalapeños, cilantro, corn, black beans, and pepper jack or cheddar cheese in an egg custard base.
preparationNotes: A zesty quiche with Southwestern flair, often including spicy elements like chorizo and jalapeños.
customerGuidance: A lively quiche with Mexican spices, chorizo, and vegetables.

name: Quiche - Denver
description: A quiche inspired by the Denver omelet, typically featuring ham, bell peppers (often green), onions, and cheddar cheese in an egg custard and pastry crust.
preparationNotes: Classic Denver omelet ingredients baked into a savory quiche.
customerGuidance: All the flavors of a Denver omelet in a delicious quiche.

name: Omelet Bar
description: A customizable omelet station where fresh omelets are prepared to order with a variety of fillings.
preparationNotes: Cooked-to-order omelets. Nutritional information and allergens depend heavily on chosen fillings. Butter may be used for cooking.
customerGuidance: Create your perfect omelet! Choose from a variety of fresh fillings. (Nutrition varies with choices)

name: Sausage Patties
description: Savory seasoned ground meat (typically pork) formed into round patties and cooked until browned and cooked through. Usually served as two patties.
preparationNotes: Classic breakfast sausage patties. Check for gluten content if sensitive, as some brands use fillers. Assumed 2 patties for nutrition.
customerGuidance: Flavorful pork sausage patties, a breakfast favorite. (Nutrition for 2 patties)

name: Turkey Bacon
description: A leaner alternative to traditional pork bacon, made from cured, smoked, and sliced turkey meat.
preparationNotes: Typically pan-fried or baked until crispy. Often contains nitrites. Assumed 2-3 slices for nutrition.
customerGuidance: A leaner bacon alternative made from turkey. (Nutrition for 2-3 slices)

name: Vegan Bacon
description: A plant-based alternative to traditional bacon, designed to mimic its smoky flavor and crispy texture.
preparationNotes: Plant-based bacon alternative. Check ingredients for specific allergens. Assumed 2-3 strips for nutrition.
customerGuidance: A smoky and savory plant-based bacon alternative. (Nutrition for 2-3 strips, varies by type)

name: Pancakes (with syrups)
description: Fluffy, griddled cakes made from batter, typically served in a stack with butter and assorted syrups.
preparationNotes: Classic American pancakes. Nutrition for a serving of 2-3 medium pancakes with syrup.
customerGuidance: A stack of fluffy pancakes served with your choice of syrup.

name: Waffles (with syrups)
description: Crisp and tender waffles made from batter cooked in a waffle iron, typically served with butter and assorted syrups.
preparationNotes: Classic breakfast waffles. Nutrition for one large waffle with syrup.
customerGuidance: Crispy golden waffles served with your choice of syrup.

name: French toast (with syrups)
description: Slices of bread soaked in an egg and milk mixture, then pan-fried until golden brown. Served with butter and assorted syrups, often dusted with powdered sugar.
preparationNotes: Classic eggy French toast. Nutrition for 2 slices with syrup.
customerGuidance: Rich and delicious French toast, served with syrup.

name: Salami
description: A type of cured sausage, consisting of fermented and air-dried meat, typically pork or beef. Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Cured sausage with a rich, savory flavor. Most types are gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Savory sliced salami, great for adding depth to sandwiches. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Smoked Turkey
description: Sliced smoked turkey breast, a popular lean deli meat choice for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Commonly used as a cold cut in sandwiches. Most brands are gluten-free, but it's good to verify for additives.
customerGuidance: Lean sliced smoked turkey, a classic sandwich choice. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Black Forest Ham
description: A type of dry-cured smoked ham, known for its distinctive dark exterior and rich flavor, typically sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Flavorful cured ham, usually gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Richly flavored Black Forest ham slices. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Pepperoni
description: An American variety of salami, usually made from cured pork and beef, seasoned with paprika or other chili pepper. Sliced for sandwiches or as a pizza topping.
preparationNotes: Spicy cured sausage, typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Spicy pepperoni slices, adding a kick to your sandwich. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

name: Corned Beef
description: Beef brisket that has been salt-cured. Often sliced for sandwiches like the Reuben.
preparationNotes: Salt-cured beef brisket, a deli classic. Typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Tender sliced corned beef, perfect for a hearty sandwich. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Roast Beef
description: Beef that has been roasted and then typically sliced thinly for sandwiches. Can be served warm or cold.
preparationNotes: Classic sliced roast beef. Naturally gluten-free when simply prepared.
customerGuidance: Flavorful sliced roast beef, a deli staple. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Pastrami
description: A popular delicatessen meat, typically made from beef brisket that is brined, partially dried, seasoned with herbs and spices, then smoked and steamed. Sliced for sandwiches.
preparationNotes: Highly seasoned smoked beef, a deli favorite. Typically gluten-free.
customerGuidance: Peppery and flavorful sliced pastrami. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

name: Tossed Cobb
description: A hearty American garden salad, typically made with chopped salad greens, tomato, crispy bacon, grilled or roasted chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, chives, Roquefort cheese, and a vinaigrette dressing.
preparationNotes: A substantial salad that can serve as a main course.
customerGuidance: A classic American Cobb salad, loaded with toppings.
